description: Defines the exact public APIs that the generated code is permitted to call. Generator must fail if it hallucinates APIs not in this list.

rules: Must capture return value and push to _cleanups
Subscribe returns a disposer that must be pushed to _cleanups

trustedStaticTemplateHTML.description: Used only by the compiler when setting template.innerHTML for fixed, compiler-owned static structures with NO external dynamic data.
trustedStaticTemplateHTML.rule: External dynamic data MUST NEVER flow into any innerHTML assignment. Use textContent instead.
